text: I feel as if I am floating between two kinds of spaces—one quiet, almost echoing with emptiness, the other vibrant, full of words and colors stimulating my mind. The first room, with its bean bags and gentle lighting, invites reflection and stillness. The second, with its bold "R+D" wall and technological displays, demands curiosity and engagement. Here, I exist between contemplation and discovery, pondering how spaces shape the unfolding of thought.
